Testimonials.quote1: Having clients, suppliers and catalog in one place has simplified our work on interior design projects a lot. Recommended for independents or studios who want to optimize their project management.
Testimonials.quote2: With Veta we've stopped wasting hours on spreadsheets. Budgets by space and cost control let us get organized and focus on design.

CtaBeforeFaq.title: Ready to transform your studio?
CtaBeforeFaq.subtitle: Join the interior design professionals who already trust Veta.

Faq.answer1: Veta is interior design project management software designed to centralize all your operations in one place. With our platform, you can manage relationships with clients and suppliers, as well as create a reusable digital product catalog to streamline your designs. Veta allows you to keep interior design budgets updated in real-time with any changes, facilitating control of purchase orders, costs and payments, and financial tracking of each project. By optimizing administrative tasks, Veta gives you time for what really matters: bringing creative value to your interior architecture projects.
Faq.answer2: Veta is a digital tool designed specifically for professionals in the Contract and Residential sectors: interior designers, studios, and freelance designers looking to professionalize their management and stop using scattered spreadsheets; interior design studios that need to centralize communication, delegate tasks, and control the profitability of multiple simultaneous projects; interior architects who require rigorous technical and financial control over supplier purchases and project budgets; and design project managers, execution specialists who demand an agile tool to manage purchase orders and payments.
Faq.answer3: Starting to optimize your interior design projects is very simple and requires no initial commitment: sign up for free and create your base account in seconds without needing to enter your credit card; explore the tools by setting up your first clients and creating your product catalog; and choose your pace by staying on the free plan as long as you need or scaling to Pro or Studio plans when your project volume and team require it.
Faq.answer4: The security of your information is our priority. At Veta we implement bank-level data protection protocols so your interior design studio can operate with complete peace of mind: we strictly comply with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), guaranteeing the privacy of your database at all times; only you and authorized members of your team have access to the platform through protected credentials; and as the owner you can exercise your rights of access, rectification, or deletion of data in a simple and direct way.

CtaFinal.title: Start today
CtaFinal.subtitle: Join the interior design professionals who are already transforming the way they work.

About.metaDescription: Meet the team behind Veta: interior design project management platform created for interior design professionals. Our story and values.
About.ogTitle: About us - Team and story | Veta
About.ogDescription: Meet the team behind Veta. Platform designed by and for interior design professionals.
About.twitterDescription: Meet the team behind Veta. Platform for interior design professionals.
About.heroTitle: Designed to help those who create
About.heroSubtitle: was born from the real need to simplify interior design project management so that interior designers can do what they do best: create spaces that transform lives.
About.storyP1: Veta started from a developer's initiative to support his partner, an interior design architect, through technology. The tool was born from observing the challenges that architects and interior designers face in interior design project management: scattered spreadsheets, hard-to-track budgets, disorganized catalogs, hard-to-find records, and fragmented communication with suppliers as constant problems.
About.storyP2: After hard work, testing, and validation with real designers and architects, Veta was created—a platform that addresses the main specific needs of the interior design architecture sector. From space management to cost control, every feature was designed with the real workflow of an interior design professional in mind.
About.storyP3: Today, Veta helps design studios save time, reduce errors, and offer better service to their clients.
About.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we do.
About.valueSimplicityDesc: We believe tools should be intuitive and easy to use, without unnecessary learning curves.
About.valuePassionDesc: We understand designers' needs because we share their passion for creating unique spaces.
About.valueCommunityDesc: We build Veta with our community of users, listening to their needs.
About.valueExcellenceDesc: We are committed to offering the best possible experience, constantly improving our platform.
About.missionBody: Veta aims to be that brand, that color, that element that stands out by empowering professionals and studios in architecture and interior design with tools that simplify their work, so they can dedicate more time to what really matters: creating spaces that transform lives.
About.creatorLinkedinTitle: Profile of Marco Gonzalo Gómez Pérez, creator of Veta, on LinkedIn
About.creatorBio: Full-stack developer with experience in digital products, APIs, and web applications. He has worked on product and technology teams in various sectors, from startups to established companies. He has an entrepreneurial background in Venezuela and Spain, with recognition from entrepreneurship and excellence awards in both countries.

Pricing.metaTitle: Pricing and Base, Pro and Studio plans
Pricing.metaDescription: Flexible plans for interior design studios: free Base, Pro and Studio with more capacity. Fixed price, no hidden costs. Try 30 days free.
Pricing.ogTitle: Pricing - Base, Pro and Studio plans | Veta
Pricing.ogDescription: Flexible plans for interior design studios. Start free, scale when you need to.
Pricing.twitterDescription: Flexible plans for interior design studios. Start free.
Pricing.heroSubtitle: Choose the plan that best fits your professional stage. No surprises, no hidden costs.
Pricing.faqSubtitle: Have questions? We answer the most common ones here.
Pricing.faq1Question: Can I change plans at any time?
Pricing.faq1Answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately. The previous plan will automatically expire.
Pricing.faq2Question: What payment methods do you accept?
Pricing.faq2Answer: We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), as well as bank transfers for annual plans.
Pricing.faq3Question: Is there a discount for annual payment?
Pricing.faq3Answer: Yes, we offer a 17% discount on all plans when paying annually. This equals a saving of 2 months of costs.
Pricing.faq4Question: What happens to my data if I cancel?
Pricing.faq4Answer: Plans remain active until the end of the period. When the plan ends, your data remains accessible but your activity is limited to what is stipulated in the base plan.

PricingSecondary.sectionTitle: Learn more about the plans and find the one that best fits you
PricingSecondary.sectionSubtitle: Each plan is designed for a different profile. Discover benefits, limits, and who it's recommended for.
PricingSecondary.customSubtitle: Contact us to create tailored plans for your studio.

Legal.metaDescription: Terms of use, privacy policy and GDPR rights for Veta. How we handle your data on the interior design project management platform.
Legal.ogDescription: Terms of use, privacy policy and GDPR compliance for Veta.
Legal.twitterDescription: Terms of use and privacy policy for Veta.
Legal.pageTitle: Terms of use and Privacy Policy
Legal.contactPrompt: If you have questions about these terms or our privacy policy, please
Legal.termsIntro: By using Veta ("the Platform"), you accept the following terms. If you disagree, do not use the service.
Legal.termsS1Content: Veta is an interior design project management platform that allows users to manage clients, projects, budgets, suppliers and product catalogs.
Legal.termsS2Content: You agree to use the Platform lawfully and in accordance with these terms. You must not use the service for illegal, abusive or third-party rights-infringing activities.
Legal.termsS3Content: You are responsible for keeping your account and password confidential. All activity under your account is your responsibility.
Legal.termsS4Content: The software, design and content of the Platform are owned by Veta or its licensors. The data you enter remains your property.
Legal.privacyIntro: We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with applicable regulations.
Legal.privacyDataContent: We collect the information you provide when you register (email, name) and the data you enter on the Platform to manage your projects (clients, suppliers, budgets, etc.).
Legal.privacyPurposeContent: We use your data to provide the service, manage your account, send necessary communications (e.g. login links) and improve the Platform.
Legal.privacyShareContent: We do not sell your personal data. We use service providers (such as Supabase) for hosting and authentication, who act as processors under contract.
Legal.privacyRetentionContent: We retain your data while you have an active account. You can request deletion of your account and data at any time.
Legal.cookiesIntro: Cookies are small text files that the website stores on your device (computer, tablet or phone) when you visit. They are used to remember preferences, keep your session or measure site usage. Only we or our authorised providers can read them.
Legal.cookiesNecessaryContent: They are essential for the site to work: without them you could not log in or use protected features.
Legal.cookiesNecessaryItem1: Supabase (authentication): session cookies to keep your access secure (e.g. sb-*-auth-token). They are only used when you log in to the platform.
Legal.cookiesStatsContent: They help us understand how the site is used (pages viewed, traffic source) in an aggregate and anonymous way.
Legal.cookiesStatsItem1: Google Analytics 4 (GA4): _ga, _ga_*, _gid, _gat — measurement of visits and events (only if you accept analytics in the cookie banner).
Legal.cookiesStatsItem2: Google Tag Manager (GTM): container that loads and manages tags (including GA4). It may use its own cookies depending on the container configuration.
Legal.cookiesStatsItem3: Vercel Analytics: performance and site usage metrics on the infrastructure where the application is hosted.
Legal.cookiesPersonalContent: They store language, theme or display preferences. We currently do not use specific personalisation cookies; the theme (light/dark) can be stored locally in your browser without identifiable cookies.
Legal.cookiesMarketingContent: They are used to show relevant ads or measure campaigns. We currently do not use advertising or remarketing cookies on this site.
Legal.cookiesUnclassContent: These are cookies we have not yet categorised or that may depend on third-party services. The tools we use (GTM, GA4, Vercel, Supabase) are covered under necessary and statistics.
Legal.cookiesPreferences: You can change your cookie preferences at any time from the cookie banner (on marketing pages) or by reviewing your browser settings.
Legal.rgpdIntro: If you reside in the European Economic Area or the United Kingdom, you have specific rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR):
Legal.rgpdAccess: Right of access: you can request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.
Legal.rgpdRectification: Right to rectification: you can request the correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
Legal.rgpdErasure: Right to erasure: you can request the deletion of your personal data ("right to be forgotten").
Legal.rgpdPortability: Right to portability: you can request to receive your data in a structured, commonly used format.
Legal.rgpdObjection: Right to object: you can object to the processing of your data in certain circumstances.
Legal.rgpdRestriction: Right to restriction: you can request that we restrict the processing of your data in certain cases.
Legal.rgpdComplaint: Right to lodge a complaint: you have the right to lodge a complaint with the data protection authority in your country.
Legal.rgpdContactIntro: To exercise any of these rights, contact us through the

PlanBase.metaTitle: Free Base plan | Interior design project management at no cost
PlanBase.metaDescription: Veta Base plan: project and budget management for interior design. 100% free to get started in interior design. One project, PDF budgets, notes. Ideal if you don't have a steady flow yet or want to try.
PlanBase.ogTitle: Base plan - Free interior design project management | Veta
PlanBase.ogDescription: Try interior design project management at no cost. Basic budget management, one project, notes. Interior design with no commitment.
PlanBase.twitterTitle: Base plan - Free interior design and project management | Veta
PlanBase.twitterDescription: Project and budget management for interior design. Try free, ideal for solo interior design.
PlanBase.heroTitleHighlight: Decide when you want to grow
PlanBase.heroSubtitle: For those who prefer to try before investing and grow when they have more projects.
PlanBase.painsTitle: If this sounds like you, the Base plan fits
PlanBase.painsSubtitle: If you're just starting in architecture or interior design on your own, don't have a steady flow of projects yet, or want to learn about interior design project management in Veta with no commitment, the Base plan is for you. One project with its budget management and expense control: all free.
PlanBase.pain1Title: I don't want to pay without trying first
PlanBase.pain1Desc: We get it. With the Base plan you use Veta for free, no card or commitment. When you see the value, you decide whether to upgrade.
PlanBase.pain2Title: I'm just getting started in interior design on my own
PlanBase.pain2Desc: One active project is enough to organize your first interior design commission: clients, suppliers, PDF budget management, and notes. No overload.
PlanBase.pain3Title: I don't have a steady flow of projects yet
PlanBase.pain3Desc: You don't need an expensive plan for sporadic projects. Base lets you do end-to-end project management on one commission and grow when more come in.
PlanBase.highlightsTitle: Everything to get started in interior design
PlanBase.highlightsSubtitle: Project management in one commission: clients, catalog, budget management, and documents.
PlanBase.highlight1Text: Project management focused on one interior design commission. Ideal for getting started in interior design or trying the tool.
PlanBase.highlight2Text: Export professional budgets for your client from day one. Essential in interior design architecture.
PlanBase.highlight3Text: Visualize expenses and keep the numbers clear without complications.
PlanBase.highlight4Text: Zero cost, zero commitment. You upgrade only when you want to.
PlanBase.ctaTitle: Start today. Pay when you decide to grow.
PlanBase.ctaSubtitle: Create your account in a minute and start with project and budget management for interior design at no cost. When you have more interior design commissions, you can move to the Pro plan.

PlanPro.metaTitle: Pro plan | Interior design project management with multiple projects
PlanPro.metaDescription: Veta Pro plan: project management and interior design at scale. 5 active projects, custom budget management, cost control, orders and payments. For interior design architecture with a project portfolio.
PlanPro.ogTitle: Pro plan - Interior design project management | Multiple projects | Veta
PlanPro.ogDescription: Project and budget management for interior design professionals. 5 active projects, cost and payment control.
PlanPro.twitterTitle: Pro plan - Interior design with multiple projects | Veta
PlanPro.twitterDescription: Project and budget management for interior design with budget management, costs and payments. Professional interior design.
PlanPro.heroTitleHighlight: Without losing track of the money
PlanPro.heroSubtitle: For interior design professionals who already bill and want project and budget management with full control of the money flow.
PlanPro.painsTitle: If this sounds like you, Pro is your plan
PlanPro.painsSubtitle: I have a portfolio of projects and want to control the money flow so I never have to ask again "am I making or losing on this project?"
PlanPro.pain1Title: Multiple interior design projects at once and I'm losing control
PlanPro.pain1Desc: With Pro you get up to 5 active projects in parallel. Project and budget management per commission: costs and payments. One tool for your interior design work, everything under control.
PlanPro.pain2Title: Larger projects and I don't know if I'm making or losing
PlanPro.pain2Desc: Cost and margin control per project: see expenses, income and margin in real time. Purchase orders and payment tracking. Essential in interior design architecture with large commissions.
PlanPro.pain3Title: I need to professionalize money management
PlanPro.pain3Desc: Custom budget management, payment and supplier order control. Everything an interior design professional with a portfolio needs to invoice and collect with peace of mind.
PlanPro.highlightsTitle: Project and budget management in one place
PlanPro.highlightsSubtitle: Costs, margins, orders, payments and budget management for interior design. Everything to master the economics of your projects.
PlanPro.highlight1Text: Interior design project management with multiple commissions in parallel without switching tools or context.
PlanPro.highlight2Text: Know at all times how much you spend, how much you invoice and how much you earn per project.
PlanPro.highlight3Text: Record orders to suppliers and payment status so you don't lose track.
PlanPro.highlight4Title: Include or exclude products from the budget
PlanPro.highlight4Text: Enable or disable products in the project and budget to adapt each quote without deleting lines.
PlanPro.highlight5Text: Export budgets tailored to each project and client. Key in professional interior design.
PlanPro.highlight6Text: Upload renders, documents and files without running out of space.
PlanPro.ctaTitle: Interior design project management without winging it.
PlanPro.ctaSubtitle: Try the Pro plan for 30 days at no cost. If it fits the pace of your projects, you stay. If not, no commitment.

PlanStudio.metaTitle: Studio plan | Project management for interior design studios
PlanStudio.metaDescription: Veta Studio plan: project management and interior design at scale. Up to 50 active projects, budget management with your brand (white label), priority support. For interior design architecture studios with a team and steady pace.
PlanStudio.ogTitle: Studio plan - Interior design architecture studios | Veta
PlanStudio.ogDescription: Project and budget management for interior design studios. 50 projects, your own brand, priority support, 100 GB.
PlanStudio.twitterTitle: Studio plan - Interior design and studios | Veta

PlanStudio.painsTitle: If your studio lives this, Studio is your plan

PlanStudio.pain1Desc: With Studio interior design project management scales: up to 50 active projects. Same tool for the whole team: budget management, costs, payments and documents. Interior design without bottlenecks.
PlanStudio.pain2Title: We're several people and we need a single source of truth
PlanStudio.pain2Desc: One space for projects, clients, suppliers and budget management. Interior design architecture studios with the team aligned, without duplicating data or losing track.
PlanStudio.pain3Title: We want budgets with our brand and real support
PlanStudio.pain3Desc: Budget management with your brand (white label), currency and tax configuration per project and priority support. For interior design studios that can't afford to stop.
PlanStudio.highlightsTitle: Project and budget management for the whole studio
PlanStudio.highlightsSubtitle: Interior design studios: more projects, budget management with your brand, more storage and priority support.
PlanStudio.highlight1Text: Interior design project management at a fast pace: multiple projects in parallel for interior design studios with a steady flow.
PlanStudio.highlight2Text: White label: export budgets with your identity. Essential in interior design architecture with a team.
PlanStudio.highlight3Text: Renders, documents and files from many projects without worrying about space.
PlanStudio.highlight4Text: Priority attention when you need it. Your studio can't wait.
PlanStudio.highlight5Text: One account, all projects. Collaboration and shared visibility.
PlanStudio.highlight6Text: Currency and tax configuration per project to adapt each budget to the client or country.
PlanStudio.ctaTitle: Scale with your studio. We've got your back.
PlanStudio.ctaSubtitle: Try the Studio plan for 30 days at no cost. Project and budget management for interior design studios. If you need specific terms, let's talk.
